title: About Yellow Leaf Cafe
intro: Pattaya's premium cannabis cafe and dispensary. Lab-tested products, expert guidance, and fast delivery across Thailand.

sections.heading: Our Mission
sections.content: Yellow Leaf Cafe exists to provide the highest quality cannabis experience in Thailand. We source exclusively from licensed Thai growers and rigorously lab-test every product for potency, purity, and safety.

sections.heading: Quality Promise
sections.content: Every product in our collection is carefully curated from Thailand's finest cannabis producers. We maintain strict quality standards and only stock products that meet our exacting criteria for aroma, flavor, and effects.

sections.heading: Visit Our Shop
sections.content: Come visit us at our physical location in Pattaya City. Our knowledgeable staff can help you find the perfect strain for your needs. Address: 361/4-5, Bang Lamung, Pattaya City, Chon Buri 20150, Thailand.

sections.heading: Delivery Across Thailand
sections.content: We deliver to all provinces across Thailand via express courier. Pattaya and Chon Buri orders arrive in 1-2 days, Bangkok in 1-3 days, and other provinces in 3-5 business days. Free shipping on orders over ฿5,000.
